title: helichrysum hebelepis
intro: Helichrysum hebelepis, also known as the yellow mountain paperflower, is a flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae). It is a perennial plant native to the mountainous regions of South Africa and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant capabilities. The plant's essential oil has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including arthritis, wounds, and digestive issues, and is also believed to have anti-cancer properties and immune-boosting effects. The oil can be obtained through steam distillation of the plant's leaves and is often used in herbal preparations such as creams, ointments, and capsules.
